reforms.description: A competition package was introduced to simplify regulation and ease firms’ administrative burdens, including a pilot scheme on tax credits for business R&D investments for the years 2002 and 2003.
reforms.growth_orientation_rationale: The tax credits incentivize private sector investment in R&D, potentially leading to increased innovation and productivity.
reforms.status_evidence: The competition package was introduced in January 2002.
reforms.importance_rationale: The introduction of tax credits for R&D represents a significant policy change aimed at enhancing private sector innovation, although it is part of a broader regulatory simplification effort.
reforms.source_quote: A competition package was introduced in January 2002 to simplify regulation and ease firms’ administrative burdens.
